description:
Add \`--emit outcomes\` to fz dump. Prints the callsite_outcomes
table grouped by caller fn:

```
outcomes: 12 callsites
  main:
    blk0 Direct → Consumed(42)
    blk1 Direct → Stalled         // print(42), Extern blocks fold
    blk2 ClosureLit(0,0) → Inlined
  apply1:
    blk0 ClosureLit(0,0) → Emitted(fn14, [10, 20, 12])
```

A debugging hatch: \"why didn't this callsite fold?\" becomes a
table lookup.

## Acceptance

- New main.rs path: dump_outcomes_pipeline.
- Output is stable / golden-able for fixtures.
- One example walkthrough in docs/.

## Removes

Nothing. Adds a diagnostic.
title: fz-CO.F.2 — Optional: fz dump --emit outcomes
